curation_notes: Re-curation. Only one non-test source file changed (signer/sign_state.go). The vulnerability was in the Save method which called GetErrorIfLessOrEqual (acquiring its own read lock) and then cacheAndMarshal (acquiring a separate write lock) as two non-atomic operations. This TOCTOU race allowed two concurrent sign requests for the same HRS to both pass the safety check before either updated the state, enabling a double-sign. The fix combines both into a single blockDoubleSign method under one mutex lock. Previous curation had L3 hints identical to L1/L2; updated L3 to be more specific (names cosigner subsystem, high watermark concept, and Cosmos validator context). L1 broadened to cover the full signing subsystem. Vulnerability class race-condition confirmed from CWE-362 and advisory description.
